items.title: Irish government announces further fuel supports after protests
items.dek: The Irish government has announced further fuel supports for a number of sectors after nationwide protests in recent weeks.
items.body: The Irish government has announced further fuel supports for a number of sectors after nationwide protests in recent weeks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tupac's family files wrongful death lawsuit in LA
items.dek: The suit seeks to uncover several "co-conspirators" who may have been involved in the star's death.
items.body: The suit seeks to uncover several "co-conspirators" who may have been involved in the star's death.
